mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS id, p.content AS content, p.image_path AS image_path, p.created_at AS created_at, p.updated_at AS updated_at, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id AS id, p.content AS content, p.image_path AS image_path, p.created_at AS created_at, p.updated_at AS updated_at, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
